title: Mazars Note: A positive message for 2023: The world is rebooting, and that's good
section_path: Mazars Note: A positive message for 2023: The world is rebooting, and that's good
section_path_text: Mazars Note: A positive message for 2023: The world is rebooting, and that's good
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
It is an uncomfortable message that we end the year with, yet a necessary one. Stability should never be seen as the ‘normal' state of things. And that's well and truly better for truly long-term investors.
